name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use Crypto Tracker

📊 Check live prices for any coin
📋 Manage your watchlist of tracked coins
🔔 Get notified when prices hit your targets
🌅 Start your day with a market summary

Tap /start to open the menu.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
